title: Ideal Money
description: Ideal money acts as a stable measuring stick for economic calculation. The concept emphasizes minimizing monetary distortion so prices, savings, and long-term contracts reflect real changes instead of policy-driven noise.

resources.title: Ideal Money and Asymptotically Ideal Money
resources.notes: Primary-source framing for money as a measuring instrument rather than a politically managed target.

resources.title: Ideal Money and Asymptotically Ideal Money (PDF)
resources.notes: Alternative copy of the essay for deeper reading and terminology alignment.

resources.title: Denationalisation of Money
resources.notes: Useful adjacent book on competitive money and why monetary quality matters for economic coordination.

aliases: ideal money and asymptotically ideal money
